Meaning.En: The sense of flavor perceived in the mouth when food or drink is held there; a specific flavor or mixture of flavors.
Meaning.Example: I can't eat this soup—it has no taste.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả cảm giác vị chua, ngọt, mặn, đắng, umami trong món ăn.
Situation.En: Describing sweet, sour, salty, bitter, or umami sensations in food.

Situation.Vi: Thử một ít món ăn để đánh giá hương vị.
Situation.En: Tasting a small amount of food to evaluate its flavor.

Meaning.En: To perceive the flavor of something by putting it in one's mouth and swallowing or holding it there briefly.
Meaning.Example: She tasted the sauce to see if it needed more salt.

Situation.Vi: Nếm thử món ăn đang nấu để điều chỉnh gia vị.
Situation.En: Tasting a dish being cooked to adjust seasoning.

Situation.Vi: Thử một món mới lần đầu tiên.
Situation.En: Trying a new dish for the first time.

Meaning.Vi: sở thích, gu (về nghệ thuật, thời trang, v.v.)
Meaning.En: A person's preferences or aesthetic judgment, especially in matters of art, fashion, or culture.
Meaning.Example: Her taste in music is very eclectic.

Situation.Vi: Đánh giá gu thẩm mỹ của một người qua cách ăn mặc.
Situation.En: Evaluating someone's aesthetic preferences through their clothing choices.

Situation.Vi: Tranh luận về gu âm nhạc của nhau.
Situation.En: Discussing or debating each other's musical preferences.
